use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Secondary action buttons in multi-step workflows
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning confirmations
Ghost and link-style buttons for inline navigation elements
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible React button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and proper Tailwind styling. Features standard hover, focus, and disabled states suitable for any web application interface requiring interactive action elements.
